input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples commonly use YAML, JSON, TOML, or HOCON files, but those formats require optional hoplite-* parser modules; generated tests should avoid assuming those modules are present unless intentionally adding coverage outside hoplite-core.

Version 3.0.0 changes environment-variable binding behavior, but that is core functionality and can be tested only if the generated test code deliberately sets/reads suitable process or system inputs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves only Kotlin/coroutines runtime dependencies and its core API can be meaningfully exercised with built-in MapPropertySource, system/environment property sources, and built-in .properties parsing; no Docker image, extra Maven module, environment variable, or system property is required up front.
